title: South Station Starbucks stays closed after inspectors find more mice
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The closure follows a social media video showing rodents in a food display case and a follow-up inspection that uncovered additional evidence of mice.
Starbucks in South Station sits closed due to rodents in Boston, Massachusetts on July 20, 2026.
(Jessica Rinaldi/Globe Staff) The Starbucks inside South Station will remain closed after a follow-up inspection Tuesday found additional evidence of mice inside the coffee shop.

title: Patriots’ Harold Landry placed on physically unable to perform list
